displayTitle: Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi #1
synopsis:
Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi #1 is the first issue of the Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi comic series, a reprint of the previously released miniseries Star Wars: The Weapon of a Jedi. The comic is written by Jason Fry and Alec Worley, illustrated by Ruairí Coleman, and released by IDW Publishing.
A comic adaptation of Junior Novel The Weapon of a Jedi: A Luke Skywalker Adventure by Jason  Fry
title: Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi #1
